options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Specifies the goal of the world.
if your goal is act 5, you need to get to the 3rd area in act 6, kauri fortress, because of zone names.

options.name: number_of_bosses
options.display_name: Bosses to kill (if Goal is set Defeat Bosses)
options.description:
This is ignored if Goal isn't set to defeat_bosses. This specifies the number of bosses that need to be defeated
(and for you to pick up their drops) in order for you to goal. This will max out at the number of bosses available in the world.

options.name: bosses_available
options.description:
This is also ignored if Goal isn't set to defeat_bosses. Specifies the availability of the bosses in the world.
This will NOT determine how many bosses are available in the world, but rather which bosses can be randomized.
This will choose any (including _very_ difficult bosses if none are selected.)

valid choices: [ "hydra", "phoenix", "chimera", "minotaur", "shaper", "uber_shaper", "elder", "uber_elder",
 "uber_uber_elder", "atziri", "al-hezmin", "baran", "drox", "veritania", "sirus", "uber_sirus", "maven",
 "uber_maven", "exarch", "uber_exarch", "eater", "uber_eater", "incarnation_of_neglect", "incarnation_of_fear",
 "incarnation_of_dread", "cortex", "uber_cortex"]

options.name: starting_character
options.description: The starting character for the world. This will determine the class available at the start.

options.name: ascendancies_available_per_class
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of available ascendancies per class.

options.name: allow_unlock_of_other_characters
options.description: Allows unlocking of other characters.

options.name: usable_starting_gear
options.description:
Specifies if you should start with the gear that you find in the tutorial, for your starting character.
use this option if you don't want to punch hillock to death.

options.name: gucci_hobo_mode
options.description:
Specifies if the world should be in Gucci Hobo Mode, this restricts use of any non-unique equipment to only 1 slot.
This is an extremely difficult challenge intended for experienced players, and will greatly increase the length of your run.
Expect a very slow start, involving farming early act 1 zones.

choices.name: allow_one_slot_of_any_rarity
choices.display_name: Allow One Slot Of Any Rarity

choices.name: allow_one_slot_of_normal_rarity
choices.display_name: Allow One Slot Of Normal Rarity

options.name: progressive_gear
options.description:
Controls whether gear rarity follows a progressive unlock system. Progressive gear is recommended for better game balance and pacing.
When enabled, you'll receive gear upgrades that will increase in rarity.
When disabled, you can receive gear of any rarity (you might find rare items before normal ones).

options.name: disable_generation_logic
options.description:
Disables all generation logic, ignoring any placement rules, and placing items completely randomly. This ignores all other "Minimum Available" Options.
This will likely make your run very difficult, and is not recommended.

options.name: gear_upgrades
options.description: Specifies if gear rarity should be restricted to a certain rarity, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.

choices.name: all_normal_and_unique_gear_unlocked
choices.display_name: All Normal And Unique Gear Unlocked

options.name: gear_upgrades_per_act
options.display_name: Minimum Available Gear Upgrades Per Act
options.description:
Specifies a minimum number of rarity of gear upgrades available per act. (there are 38 total)
This will be ignored if the "Gear Upgrades" option is turned off.

options.name: add_flasks_to_item_pool
options.description:
Specifies if flasks should be restricted, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.
You may equip up to 5 flasks of a given rarity, and can unlock more flasks of a rarity through items.

options.name: flasks_per_act
options.display_name: Minimum Available Flask Slots Per Act
options.description:
Specifies a minimum number of available flask slots per act. (there are 5 total)
This will be ignored if the "Flask Slots" option is turned off.

options.name: add_max_links_to_item_pool
options.description: Specifies if the number of linked support gem slots you can use in gear should be restricted, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.

options.name: max_links_per_act
options.display_name: Minimum Available Support Gem Slots Per Act
options.description:
Specifies a minimum number of available linked support gem slots per act. (there are 22 total)
This will be ignored if the "Support Gem Slot Upgrades" option is turned off.

options.name: add_passive_skill_points_to_item_pool
options.description: Specifies if passive skill points should be restricted, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.

options.name: add_leveling_up_to_location_pool
options.description: Specifies if leveling up be considered "locations".

options.name: add_area_locations_to_location_pool
options.description:
Specifies if reaching areas (zones) should be considered "locations".
Only areas up to the goal act are included.

options.name: add_skill_gems_to_item_pool
options.description: Specifies if skill gems should be restricted, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.

options.name: skill_gems_per_act
options.display_name: Minimum Available Skill Gem Slots Per Act
options.description:
Specifies the minimum number of usable skill gems placed by the generator per act.
Higher values will place more relevant skill gems early on

options.name: add_support_gems_to_item_pool
options.description: Specifies if skill gems should be restricted, unlockable through items found in the multiworld.

options.name: support_gems_per_act
options.display_name: Minimum Usable Support Gems Per Act
options.description: Specifies the minimum number of usable support gems (by character level) placed by the generator per act.

options.name: loot_filter_sounds
options.description: sounds for the Archipelago items drop.

options.name: loot_filter_display
options.description: Loot filter display style.

options.name: enable_tts
options.description:
Enable Text-to-Speech (TTS). If using other loot filter sounds, this option will still generate TTS audio files for invalid state warnings.
If this is disabled, this will ignore Loot Filter Sounds if set to TTS.
If TTS is enabled, the client will generate audio files for item drops that are not already present,
This may take some time initially, but will speed as audio files are generated and saved.

options.name: tts_speed
options.description: Speed of the Text-to-Speech (TTS) feature, if enabled.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Endurance Charge on Melee Stun Support

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Endurance Charge on Melee Stun Support

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Endurance Charge on Melee Stun Support

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Endurance Charge on Melee Stun Support

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Reach The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Reach The Chamber of Sins Level 2
Reach The Upper Sceptre of God
Reach The Belly of the Beast Level 1
Reach The Belly of the Beast Level 2
Reach The Temple of Decay Level 1
Reach The Temple of Decay Level 2
Reach The Belly of the Beast

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: Reach The Chamber of Sins Level 1
Reach The Chamber of Sins Level 2
Reach The Upper Sceptre of God
Reach The Belly of the Beast Level 1
Reach The Belly of the Beast Level 2

Reach The Temple of Decay Level 2
Reach The Belly of the Beast

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: Reach The Chamber of Sins Level 1

Reach The Upper Sceptre of God
Reach The Belly of the Beast Level 1

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
